required_operator_inputs: treat the mapped advanced-color function inventory as binding authority instead of redefining the MVP
preserve the lane-stack and ordered-composition requirement already recorded in the checked-in advanced-color plans
repair the main advanced-color foundation plan so the next executable slice is backend recovery rather than an underspecified Grading continuation
follow the repo's phased-plan and contract workflow instead of chat-only sequencing
forbidden_operator_prompts: redefine the advanced-color MVP from scratch
treat the current foundation plan as executable without repairing its phase drift and missing hostile-audit state
start Grading implementation before the stack/backend recovery slice is planned honestly
promote the common-fractal wave or CUDA catalog refactor ahead of the advanced-color recovery thread

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The advanced color library foundation Phase 5 recovery contract validates successfully
